data.name: King of Texas
data.detailed_description:
關注焦點


關於此遊戲



Jon Bega’s dream has just come true, he’s been drafted as the new running back for one of America’s best football team, the Dallas Sheriffs. What will happen to this athletic Louisianan when he moves up to Texas to join this new team?

Will he fit in?

Will he find love?

Will he win the Super Bowl?

Will he meet his forever Waifu?

Only you can find out by playing King of Texas.




Featuring:

  • A hilarious and romantic sports story
  • Beautiful Anime Art
  • Country and classic rock style original soundtrack
  • Delicious and very saucy CGs
  • Eternally loyal waifus
  • Fantastic Football Minigame

data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Vista or higher
  • 處理器: 1.8 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Vista or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X version Leopard 10.5.8 or later
  • 處理器: 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X version Leopard 10.5.8 or later
  • 處理器: 1.66 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • 儲存空間: 500 GB 可用空間
